requirement_topic.en: EPC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz Island Grid, IEC 62933, and OOTR / EPC Project-Specific Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EPC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz岛屿电网、IEC 62933及OOTR/EPC项目专属要求
requirement_topic.zht: EPC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz島嶼電網、IEC 62933及OOTR/EPC項目專屬要求

summary.en: The Electric Power Corporation (EPC) is Samoa's sole electricity generation, transmission, and distribution utility, operating under the Electric Power Corporation Act 1980. The Office of the Regulator (OOTR) regulates the electricity sector under the Electricity Act 2010. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale solar-plus-storage projects central to Samoa's 100% renewable energy target — require EPC technical review and grid-connection approval, and must satisfy any conditions set by OOTR. Samoa's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. This voltage is different from China's 220/380 V nominal; BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be re-parameterised for Samoa's 230/400 V grid and the difference must not be dismissed as negligible. No publicly accessible dedicated EPC BESS grid-connection technical specification has been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from EPC. International standards IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 are the expected project-specification references for BESS system-level performance and safety where donor-funded or IEC-aligned EPC projects are involved. Samoa's island grid is small, isolated, and sensitive to frequency and voltage disturbances; BESS frequency-response and fault-ride-through settings must be agreed with EPC before commissioning.
summary.zh: 电力公司（EPC）是萨摩亚唯一的发电、输电和配电公用事业单位，依据1980年《电力公司法》运营。监管办公室（OOTR）依据2010年《电力法》监管电力行业。所有并网BESS装置——包括对萨摩亚100%可再生能源目标至关重要的大规模光伏储能项目——均须取得EPC技术审查和并网批准，并须满足OOTR设定的任何条件。萨摩亚电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、频率50 Hz。此电压与中国标称220/380 V不同；BESS储能变流器（PCS）须重新针对萨摩亚230/400 V电网进行参数配置，此差异不可视为可忽略。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EPC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向EPC获取。对于由捐助方资助或采用IEC标准的EPC项目，IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2是BESS系统级性能和安全的预期项目规格参考标准。萨摩亚岛屿电网规模小、相互隔离，对频率和电压扰动敏感；BESS频率响应和故障穿越参数须在调试前与EPC协商确定。
summary.zht: 電力公司（EPC）是薩摩亞唯一的發電、輸電和配電公用事業單位，依據1980年《電力公司法》運營。監管辦公室（OOTR）依據2010年《電力法》監管電力行業。所有併網BESS裝置——包括對薩摩亞100%可再生能源目標至關重要的大規模光伏儲能項目——均須取得EPC技術審查和併網批准，並須滿足OOTR設定的任何條件。薩摩亞電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、頻率50 Hz。此電壓與中國標稱220/380 V不同；BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須重新針對薩摩亞230/400 V電網進行參數配置，此差異不可視為可忽略。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EPC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向EPC獲取。對於由捐助方資助或採用IEC標準的EPC項目，IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2是BESS系統級性能和安全的預期項目規格參考標準。薩摩亞島嶼電網規模小、相互隔離，對頻率和電壓擾動敏感；BESS頻率響應和故障穿越參數須在調試前與EPC協商確定。

standards_or_laws: Electric Power Corporation Act 1980 (Samoa) — establishes EPC as the sole grid operator and utility
Electricity Act 2010 (Samoa) — establishes OOTR as the electricity sector regulator

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference for donor-funded or IEC-aligned EPC projects)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Samoa grid parameters: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016. Chinese BESS products are validated for the China grid at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Samoa shares the 50 Hz frequency but operates at 230/400 V — a nominal difference of approximately 5% on each phase. This is not negligible: PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, reactive power control bands, and transformer tap selection must all be re-examined and re-parameterised for Samoa's 230/400 V grid before grid-connection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T certificates are not accepted as substitutes for EPC or IEC 62933 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016进行评估。中国BESS产品经国家电网认可，适用于50 Hz、220/380 V中国电网（单相220 V、三相380 V）。萨摩亚共享50 Hz频率，但运行电压为230/400 V——各相标称差异约为5%。此差异不可忽视：PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数、无功功率控制范围及变压器分接头选择，均须在并网测试和调试前针对萨摩亚230/400 V电网重新审查并重新配置参数。中国GB/T证书不被接受为EPC或IEC 62933证据的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016進行評估。中國BESS產品經國家電網認可，適用於50 Hz、220/380 V中國電網（單相220 V、三相380 V）。薩摩亞共享50 Hz頻率，但運行電壓為230/400 V——各相標稱差異約為5%。此差異不可忽視：PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數、無功功率控制範圍及變壓器分接頭選擇，均須在併網測試和調試前針對薩摩亞230/400 V電網重新審查並重新配置參數。中國GB/T證書不被接受為EPC或IEC 62933證據的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EPC's grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Samoa operates at 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; a nominal ~5% difference per phase that must not be dismissed; PCS voltage protection thresholds, reactive power control bands, ride-through curves, and transformer tap configurations must be re-parameterised and validated for Samoa's grid before commissioning; (b) island grid sensitivity — Samoa's small isolated grid has limited fault current and inertia; BESS frequency-response droop settings, rate-of-change-of-frequency (RoCoF) protection, and black-start capability (if required) must be agreed with EPC and may differ substantially from settings valid on China's large interconnected grid; (c) EPC project-specific connection agreement — no publicly accessible EPC BESS technical specification has been confirmed; engage EPC at the earliest project stage to obtain connection agreement requirements before equipment procurement; (d) IEC 62933 compliance — where EPC or project-owner specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) communication protocols — confirm SCADA / communication interface protocol required by EPC for BESS monitoring.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足EPC并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——萨摩亚运行电压为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；各相标称差异约5%，不可忽视；PCS电压保护阈值、无功功率控制范围、穿越曲线及变压器分接头配置，须在调试前针对萨摩亚电网重新配置参数并验证；（b）岛屿电网敏感性——萨摩亚小型孤立电网故障电流和惯量有限；BESS频率响应下垂参数、频率变化率（RoCoF）保护及黑启动能力（如需）须与EPC协商确定，可能与中国大型互联电网的有效参数存在实质性差异；（c）EPC项目专属并网协议——尚未确认EPC公开发布BESS技术规格；在设备采购前应在项目最早阶段与EPC接触以获取并网协议要求；（d）IEC 62933合规——若EPC或项目业主规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）通信协议——确认EPC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足EPC併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——薩摩亞運行電壓為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；各相標稱差異約5%，不可忽視；PCS電壓保護閾值、無功功率控制範圍、穿越曲線及變壓器分接頭配置，須在調試前針對薩摩亞電網重新配置參數並驗證；（b）島嶼電網敏感性——薩摩亞小型孤立電網故障電流和慣量有限；BESS頻率響應下垂參數、頻率變化率（RoCoF）保護及黑啟動能力（如需）須與EPC協商確定，可能與中國大型互聯電網的有效參數存在實質性差異；（c）EPC項目專屬併網協議——尚未確認EPC公開發布BESS技術規格；在設備採購前應在項目最早階段與EPC接觸以獲取併網協議要求；（d）IEC 62933合規——若EPC或項目業主規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）通訊協議——確認EPC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EPC grid-connection approval and OOTR electricity regulatory compliance are required for all grid-connected BESS in Samoa; specific BESS technical requirements must be obtained directly from EPC as no publicly accessible dedicated specification has been confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Samoa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy EPC's Samoa grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Samoa's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid — the ~5% voltage difference from China's 220/380 V is not negligible and must be explicitly addressed in equipment design and commissioning. Samoa's small island grid imposes additional frequency-response and RoCoF sensitivity requirements that must be agreed with EPC. No publicly accessible EPC BESS technical specification has been confirmed — direct EPC engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised. Where IEC 62933 evidence is required by EPC or project-owner specifications, prepare documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足EPC萨摩亚并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对萨摩亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置——与中国220/380 V的约5%电压差异不可忽视，须在设备设计和调试中明确处理。萨摩亚小型岛屿电网对频率响应和RoCoF提出了额外要求，须与EPC协商确定。尚未确认EPC公开发布BESS技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与EPC接触至关重要。若EPC或项目业主规格要求IEC 62933证据，须相应准备文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足EPC薩摩亞併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對薩摩亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置——與中國220/380 V的約5%電壓差異不可忽視，須在設備設計和調試中明確處理。薩摩亞小型島嶼電網對頻率響應和RoCoF提出了額外要求，須與EPC協商確定。尚未確認EPC公開發布BESS技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與EPC接觸至關重要。若EPC或項目業主規格要求IEC 62933證據，須相應準備文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據。
